prompt_text:
### Demographics: 50-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.7 kg; Height 163.3 cm; BMI 31.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/64 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 212mg/dL; 9 months ago 235mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.3kg; 9 months ago 82.2kg; 6 months ago 84.3kg; 3 months ago 79.9kg; current 83.7kg), Height (12 months ago 163.3cm; 9 months ago 163.3cm; 6 months ago 163.3cm; 3 months ago 163.3cm; current 163.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 63mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 64mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 53U/L; 9 months ago 41U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 43U/L; current 47U/L), AST (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 267mg/g; 9 months ago 273mg/g; 6 months ago 343mg/g; 3 months ago 256mg/g; current 287mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 152mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
